options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: specific_keys
options.description: Normal keys are specific to a dungeon. The key count for each dungeon may be found in extra pages in the pause menu. Turn off to make normal keys act like in vanilla. If off, you may need to buy keys from Zaegul.

options.name: colors_required
options.description: Number of colors out of 5 needed to enter the Lighthouse.

options.name: blessings_required
options.description: Number of blessings out of 5 needed to access Enlightenment or to get the Hero's Rest ending.

options.name: crest_fragments_required
options.description: Number of crest fragments out of 5 needed to get past the door in Castle Vann.

options.name: coins_of_crowl_required
options.description: Number of Coins of Crowl out of 13 needed to get past the underwater door.

options.name: goal
options.description:
The goal of the game.
var: Defeat Var.
rest: Revive Torran.
shadow: Defeat Shadow Oran.
torran: Defeat Torran.
any: Defeat any of the three.

options.name: color_locations
options.description:
Choose where your colors can be found.
dungeon_prizes: Colors can be found on dungeon prizes (Vulture, Tidal Frog, Water Blessing, Rat Potion, Wren, Yhote, Spirit of Vann, Ram Wraith, Loomagnos, Earth Blessing, Color Correction, Light Spirit, Stindle, Frozen Heart, Killer, Siska, Mechanized Slot Machine, Inkwell).
local: Colors can be found anywhere in your own world.
any: Colors can be found in any world.

options.name: blessing_locations
options.description:
Choose where your blessings can be found.
dungeon_prizes: Blessings can be found on dungeon prizes (Vulture, Tidal Frog, Water Blessing, Rat Potion, Wren, Yhote, Spirit of Vann, Ram Wraith, Loomagnos, Earth Blessing, Color Correction, Light Spirit, Stindle, Frozen Heart, Killer, Siska, Mechanized Slot Machine, Inkwell).
local: Blessings can be found anywhere in your own world.
any: Blessings can be found in any world.

options.name: lighthouse_key
options.description:
Choose where your lighthouse key can be found. (Only applies if Specific Keys is on)
blessings: The lighthouse key is obtained when you return the blessings and get the Hero's Soul.
coins: The lighthouse key is found underwater behind the door requiring coins of Crowl.
materials: The lighthouse key is given to you by Bolivar when you give him the four materials.
local: The lighthouse key may be found anywhere in your own world.
any: The lighthouse key may be found in any world.

options.name: trading_quest
options.description:
How to handle the trading quest.
vanilla: The Lost Shipment and Ulni checks are randomized. The entire trading quest must be completed as in vanilla to get Ulni's check.
skip: The Lost Shipment location and Anchor Greaves are randomized. The Lost Shipment itself is not randomized, and Ulni is not a check.
shuffle: All items in the trading quest are randomized, and each of the corresponding NPCs is a check.

options.name: shuffle_grelin_drops
options.description: Grelin randomly drop four Archipelago items, and the Holy Relic, Wedding Ring, Silver Mirror, and Painting are added to the pool.

options.name: shuffle_hidden_items
options.description: Include hidden overworld items in the pool.

options.name: shuffle_bjerg_castle
options.description: Include Bjerg Castle (Mariana's marriage dungeon) in the pool. A sailor near the arena will take you there.

options.name: shuffle_daemons_dive
options.description: Include Daemon's Dive in the pool.

options.name: shuffle_enlightenment
options.description: Include Enlightenment in the pool.

options.name: shuffle_secret_shop
options.description: Include Zaegul's Secret Shop in the pool.

options.name: skips_in_logic
options.description: The seed may require skips such as side hits, two-tile flare jumps outside of Enlightenment, deleting objects with the Empowered Hand, and interacting with objects from a tile away.

options.name: start_with_spiced_ham
options.description: Start with a buff that lets you run.

options.name: start_with_winged_boots
options.description: Start with Winged Boots.

options.name: skip_one_small_favor
options.description: Tara gives you an item directly instead of requiring you to go on a fetch quest.

options.name: fake_dread_hand
options.description: Allow using teleport statues without having the dread hand.

options.name: fast_fishing
options.description: Only 100 points are required in the fishing minigame to get the item from Keaton and to get free fish.

options.name: altar_to_var
options.description: Defile the altar to Var. Receive double damage.

options.name: altar_to_zolei
options.description: Defile the altar to Zolei. Item drops are reduced in frequency, and you must fight Zolei alongside Var.

options.name: altar_to_raem
options.description: Defile the altar to Raem. Raem will attack you with beams of light, and you cannot gain extra HP through prayer.

options.name: altar_to_hate
options.description: Defile the altar to Hate. Heart ores do not increase your maximum HP.

options.name: curse_of_frailty
options.description: Accept the curse of frailty. You die in one hit.

options.name: curse_of_famine
options.description: Accept the curse of famine. You cannot buy buffs.

options.name: curse_of_rust
options.description: Accept the curse of rust. The pick cannot be upgraded, and boots and rings do not work, except for the Winged Boots and Wedding Rings.

options.name: curse_of_wind
options.description: Accept the curse of wind. Doubles the speed of projectiles.

options.name: curse_of_blooms
options.description: Accept the curse of blooms. Enemies drop bombs when they die.

options.name: curse_of_crowns
options.description: Accept the curse of crowns. You cannot marry anyone.

options.name: curse_of_horns
options.description: Accept the curse of horns. All junk items, such as gold, are replaced by traps. Note that if no trap options are selected then all traps will be enabled.

options.name: curse_of_flames
options.description: Accept the curse of flames. Flames appear behind you as you move through dungeons.

options.name: trap_chance
options.description: Percentage chance of an added filler item being a trap. Items in the base pool are not affected. Has no effect if Curse of Horns is active.

options.name: enable_all_traps
options.description: Enabling this overrides the individual trap settings and enables all types of traps.

options.name: slowness_traps
options.description: Enable slowness traps, which prevent you from running for 20 seconds.

options.name: rust_traps
options.description: Enable rust traps, which disable boots and rings for 20 seconds.

options.name: confusion_traps
options.description: Enable confusion traps, which reverse your movement for 20 seconds.

options.name: disarming_traps
options.description: Enable disarming traps, which prevent use of the pick for 20 seconds.

options.name: light_traps
options.description: Enable light traps, which attack you with beams of light for 20 seconds.

options.name: glitch_traps
options.description: Enable glitch traps, which cause graphical glitches for 20 seconds.

options.name: zombie_traps
options.description: Enable zombie traps, which spawn zombies around you.

options.name: shadow_traps
options.description: Enable shadow traps, which warp you as though you used the Dread Hand.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
